Selected Work

Portraits

Studio portrait 60–90 min

from $320

Controlled lighting, backdrop options, and a relaxed pace for headshots or creative portraits.

from $380

Subject in context—home, studio, or workspace—with natural light and subtle direction.

Couples & families 90–120 min

from $450

Small groups, candid-led posing, and a cohesive set of images for print and web.

Actor & performer pack 45 min

from $280

Tight turnaround, neutral tones, and web-ready crops for casting and promotion.

Graduation & milestones 45–60 min

from $260

Caps, gowns, or informal milestones—clean compositions and quick preview delivery.

MARY JANE

Portraits

Editorial

Events

Commercial

Deliverables

Morphogenesis

Solid form gives way to liquid movement.

MARY JANE — PHOTOGRAPHY

Her work sits between editorial clarity and something more intimate: portraits that refuse caricature, events distilled into rhythm and color, and still lifes that behave like memories—soft at the edges, exact where it counts. Every series is built the same way: observe longer than feels comfortable, then edit until only what matters remains.

“I am not chasing perfection in the frame. I am chasing honesty—and honesty is almost always a little imperfect.”

Whether the brief is a single headshot or a full day in motion, the through-line is the same: images that feel lived-in, deliberate, and unmistakably hers. This is the craft behind MARY JANE—quiet on the surface, restless in the detail.

What our clients say

"

Mary made the whole shoot feel effortless. The portraits are luminous—exactly the calm, editorial mood I wanted.

Sophie Laurent
★★★★★
"

Every frame felt considered, from direction to editing. I would book again in a heartbeat for personal and brand work.

Olivia Robinson
★★★★★
"

Subtle, refined color and beautiful use of light. The gallery told a cohesive story without feeling staged.

Lucas Meyer
★★★★★
"

Professional from first email to delivery. The images elevated our lookbook and matched the brief perfectly.

Fine Laurent
★★★★★
"

Warm, patient, and precise. The final set felt honest and elevated—exactly what we hoped for our campaign.

Emma Dubois
★★★★★
"

A rare mix of technical skill and emotional intelligence behind the camera. Highly recommend for editorial.

James Chen
★★★★★

Our event coverage was stunning—candid moments and details I did not expect. Turnaround was fast and organized.

Clara Fontaine
